user.title: Steam Inventory — Steam Accounts
user.description: Enter your Steam account IDs. Format: `steamid:name,steamid:name` (e.g. `{example}`). Inventories must be public.

settings.title: Steam Inventory — Settings
settings.description: The integration will auto-discover all your Steam games with marketable items.

data.strict_missing_ratio: Strict missing ratio (0–1) — recommended: 0.3 (skip if >30% prices missing)
data.min_item_value: Minimum item value (EUR, 0 = all) — recommended: 0.5 to ignore cheap items
data.max_items: Maximum items per game (0 = no limit) — recommended: 200 for large inventories
data.include_trading_cards: Include Steam trading cards (App 753, context 6) — can add hundreds of items
data.fetch_floats: Fetch CS2 float values via CSGOFloat API (CS2 only, opt-in)

data.import_start_date: Import start date (YYYY-MM-DD, empty = full history)

abort.already_configured: This Steam account is already configured.

error.invalid_steam_ids: Invalid Steam ID format. Must be 17-digit numbers, optionally followed by :alias.

run_import.name: Run Historical Import
run_import.description: Fetch Steam Market price history for all inventory items and inject into HA recorder statistics.

steam_cookie.name: Steam Cookie
steam_cookie.description: Value of the steamLoginSecure cookie (Steam session authentication).

import_start_date.name: Import Start Date
import_start_date.description: Only import history from this date onwards (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave empty for full history.

min_item_value.name: Minimum Item Value
min_item_value.description: Skip items below this price in EUR (0 = include all items).

generate_dashboards.name: Generate Dashboards
generate_dashboards.description: Write Lovelace YAML dashboard files to the steam_dashboards/ folder in your config directory.

force_refresh.name: Force Refresh
force_refresh.description: Trigger an immediate Steam inventory and price scan outside the normal interval.

set_buy_price.name: Set Buy Price
set_buy_price.description: Record or remove the purchase price of an item in cs2_buy_prices.json.

market_hash_name.name: Market Hash Name
market_hash_name.description: Exact Steam Market name of the item (e.g. 'AK-47 | Redline (Field-Tested)').

price.name: Price
price.description: Purchase price in EUR. Set to 0 or leave empty to remove the entry.

data.include_trading_cards: Include Steam trading cards (hundreds of items)
